---
title: "Getting Started"
subtitle: "EMSE 4572/6572: Exploratory Data Analysis"
author: "John Paul Helveston"
institute: "The George Washington University | EMSE"
date: "August 26, 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: lexis.scss
    template-partials:
      - title-slide.html
    slide-number: c/t
    slide-level: 2
    incremental: false
    highlight-style: github
    width: 1600
    height: 900
filters:
  - at: pre-quarto
    path: inverse-bg.lua
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
```

## Outline {.inverse}

### 1. First topic
### 2. Second topic
### 3. Third topic

## A code chunk

```{r}
#| echo: true

head(mtcars)
```
